identity: Canonical smooth-iteration gradient / base carrier all composites build on; fully palette-respecting and robust across locations.
Triangle-inequality-average banding; strong standalone, skip 1 (drops the unstable first term), linear transform (log/sqrt are coloring-curve options, not separate modes).
Stripe-average banding; combed flowing striations; density 6, linear transform (the standalone form of the c13 composite base).
Exponential-smoothing smooth-escape field (Σ exp(−|z|)), linear stretch.
reason: Averaging-family drop-in alternative to smooth, added with the UF-algorithm reconstruction before smooth was promoted as the canonical base carrier — redundant with it by design. Its field is rank-corr ≈1 (Spearman ≥0.999 across all 8 families) with smooth, so the pilot's 34 rasters were pixel-dupes (ΔE76<5, all flagged too_close_to_smooth). Its one nominal knob divergescale is hardcoded 1.0 and would be absorbed by the percentile-stretch anyway (no live parameter; no fixed-palette path exists). Deprecated for render-mode exploration; smooth is the canonical carrier.

identity: Smooth base + gaussian_int texture (color_by mean_angle), screen combine, weight 0.85.
Smooth base + gaussian_int texture (color_by angle_min), screen combine, weight 0.85.
C7 flagship: smooth base + trap_circle texture, screen combine, weight 0.85.
C13 flagship: smooth base + stripe (density 6) texture, screen combine, weight 0.85.
C17 flagship: smooth base + curvature texture, screen combine, weight 0.85.
Pure gaussian-integer min-distance lattice-trap field, linear.
reason: Min-distance field reads as sparse dots (heavily-peaked distribution); palette-poor solo. Its promoted form is the composites that use it as a texture (c7 / mean_angle / angle_min).

identity: Direct-trap composite, ring shape (r=1), screen over black start.
reason: Cleanest of the direct-trap family (floor <2%) but palette-indifferent by construction (raw d/threshold key, no whole-image normalization). Demoted with the family; genuine palette-respect needs two-pass whole-image key-normalization — parked as not worth it.

identity: Direct-trap composite, cross shape, screen over black start.
reason: Scalar twin trap_cross floor-clusters ~22%; location-specialist, palette-indifferent. Family palette-respect needs two-pass whole-image key-normalization — parked. SATURATION CAP: the cross+screen additive accumulator drives to unrecoverable (1,1,1) as trap hits stack (measured hard-blowout on worst-case locations: ~0% at opacity≤0.08, ~6% at 0.15, 14% @0.20, 39% @0.30, 71% @0.45; at op=0.15 threshold axis: 0% @≤0.05, 6% @0.08, 19% @0.12). Non-saturating regime = opacity≤0.15 ∧ threshold≤0.08 (default 0.15/0.05 is the clean corner). Enforced source-side (render_direct_trap DTS_SCREEN_*_CAP), gated to cross+screen only — ring/lines/multiply don't saturate and are uncapped; soft_knee rolloff rescues the partial tier, the cap handles the rest. Forward-only.

identity: Direct-trap composite, cross shape, multiply over white start (dark lace on light).
reason: The dark-lace-on-light look depends on start_color + multiply, not the palette; location-specialist. Family palette-respect needs two-pass whole-image key-normalization — parked.

identity: Direct-trap composite, anisotropic |Im z| lines, screen over black start.
reason: Narrowest / most directional of the family; palette-indifferent by construction. Family palette-respect needs two-pass whole-image key-normalization — parked.

identity: Solo trap_circle field (min of ||z|-r|), no shade.
reason: Not viable solo at high-complexity locations; its promoted home is the C7 composite texture.
Curvature single-field transform probe; curvature's promoted home is the C17 composite texture.
